headline: Built for Veles
subheadline: AI-powered systems to streamline B2B sales negotiations and boost revenue for a growing 6-employee startup

challenges.title: Team Scaling
challenges.desc: With only 6 employees, Veles struggles to handle growing demand for AI sales tools. This limits rapid feature development and client support in a competitive market. Post-seed funding adds pressure to deliver results quickly.

challenges.title: Deal Streamlining
challenges.desc: Veles faces delays in B2B negotiations due to manual processes. Sales teams need real-time coaching to close deals faster, but current tools fall short. This impacts revenue acceleration in a crowded AI landscape.

challenges.title: Revenue Growth
challenges.desc: As a startup, Veles must maximize ASP from deals, but inconsistent strategies hinder progress. Limited resources make it hard to test and refine negotiation tactics. This slows overall business expansion post-funding.

challenges.title: Market Competition
challenges.desc: Veles operates in a saturated AI sales platform space, making differentiation tough. Building trust with B2B clients requires proven tools, yet their small size limits marketing reach. This affects user adoption and long-term growth.

deliverables.title: Negotiation AI System
deliverables.desc: Builds real-time coaching tools that integrate with Veles' platform to optimize deal strategies and increase ASP. This connects with existing sales workflows for seamless use.

deliverables.title: Deal Desk Framework
deliverables.desc: Creates standardized deal terms and proposal builders that plug into Veles' current systems to speed up closures. This ensures efficient operations without disrupting ongoing negotiations.

deliverables.title: Growth Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Develops dashboards that track weekly growth metrics and integrate with Veles' data sources for better decision-making. This helps monitor post-seed funding progress and adjust strategies.

deliverables.title: Client Onboarding Module
deliverables.desc: Constructs automated onboarding for B2B clients that links to Veles' platform to reduce support workload. This scales the team's capacity and enhances user experience in a competitive market.

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Veles' current sales infrastructure and identify key pain points from their B2B operations.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop and integrate AI systems tailored to Veles' negotiation tools, focusing on revenue acceleration.

engagementSteps.title: Deployment and Optimization
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Launch the new infrastructure and refine based on initial usage data from Veles' platform.

faqItems.question: What is AI sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It includes tools that automate B2B negotiations and provide data-driven insights for Veles.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with Veles?
faqItems.answer: Systems plug directly into Veles' platform to streamline deals without major overhauls.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Pricing aligns with Veles' seed funding stage, focusing on scalable, value-based investments.

faqItems.question: How long is the implementation?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, customized to Veles' 6-employee team's needs.

faqItems.question: Will this help with revenue growth?
faqItems.answer: Yes, by optimizing deal strategies based on Veles' specific B2B challenges.

faqItems.question: Is data security ensured?
faqItems.answer: All integrations follow Veles' privacy policies to protect sensitive sales information.

stackItems.name: Python
stackItems.role: Handles AI model development for Veles' negotiation tools

stackItems.name: TensorFlow
stackItems.role: Powers machine learning algorithms in Veles' sales platform

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Manages cloud hosting and scalability for Veles' infrastructure

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Integrates CRM functions to track Veles' B2B deals

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Facilitates team communication during Veles' project implementations
